# Smart Loan Saver

## What this tool does

Smart Loan Saver is a free, browser-based loan prepayment planner. It helps borrowers in India calculate how much interest they save and how many years they cut from their loan tenure by making extra payments on a home loan or personal loan.

## Who it is for

Anyone repaying a home loan, personal loan, or any instalment loan who wants to understand the impact of prepayments without visiting a bank or downloading an app.

## Main public URL

https://loan-khatam.replit.app/bento-planner/

## Key capabilities

- Enter loan principal, interest rate, tenure, and start date
- Set a monthly extra-payment amount using a slider
- Instantly see interest saved, tenure reduction, and total repayment cost
- Compare "standard path" vs "accelerated savings plan" side by side
- View four pre-built payoff strategies (1 extra EMI per year, 5 % monthly boost, 10 % monthly boost, super-saver combo) with savings estimates
- Year-by-year amortisation schedule
- All amounts shown in Indian Rupees (₹)

## No login required

The tool runs entirely in the browser. No account, no sign-up, no data sent to a server.

## Related product

Loan Khatam — a personal loan tracker for money lent to friends and family: https://loan-khatam.replit.app/
